markdown:
# Torch

A Torch burns for 1 hour, casting [[bright_light]] in a 20-foot radius and [[dim_light]] for an additional 20 feet. When you take the [[attack]] action, you can attack with the Torch, using it as a Simple Melee weapon. On a hit, the target takes 1 Fire damage.
